## Summary

Add **automated integration and unit tests** for critical ZCore API paths: wallet auth (SEP-53), credit event reporting (anti-Sybil), and lender score queries. Manual QA missed the production SEP-53 verification mismatch (#11).

---

## Motivation

| Flow | Risk if untested |
|------|------------------|
| Challenge + SEP-53 verify | Register/login broken in prod |
| `POST /api/events/report` | Score inflation, Sybil bypass |
| Lender `GET /score` | Unauthorized score leaks |

Tests should run in CI (#19) on every PR.

---

## Recommended stack

| Layer | Tool |
|-------|------|
| Test runner | **Vitest** (fast, ESM-friendly) or Jest |
| HTTP integration | **supertest** against Express app |
| DB | Docker MySQL in CI, or `@prisma/client` against test DB |
| Horizon / Soroban | Mock `fetch` or inject service mocks |

**Entry point for supertest:** Export `app` from `Server/src/app.ts` (already separated from `listen`).

---

## Test suites to implement

### 1. Unit ‚Äî `auth-challenge.service.ts`

**File:** `Server/src/services/__tests__/auth-challenge.service.test.ts`

| Case | Expected |
|------|----------|
| SEP-53 official test vector | `verifyWalletSignature` ‚Üí true |
| Wrong public key | false |
| Expired challenge (`Expires` in past) | false |
| Tampered wallet line in message | false |
| Invalid base64 signature | false |
| Signature length ‚âÝ 64 bytes | false |

Use test seed from [SEP-0053](https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/ecosystem/sep-0053.md):
- Address: `GBXFXNDLV4LSWA4VB7YIL5GBD7BVNR22SGBTDKMO2SBZZHDXSKZYCP7L`
- Message: `Hello, World!` (for vector test of hash function helper)

### 2. Integration ‚Äî auth routes

**File:** `Server/src/__tests__/auth.integration.test.ts`

- `POST /api/auth/challenge` with valid/invalid wallet
- `POST /api/auth/register/signed` full roundtrip with generated keypair
- `POST /api/auth/login/signed` for existing user
- Duplicate register returns existing user gracefully

Requires test DB + migrated schema.

### 3. Integration ‚Äî events controller

**File:** `Server/src/__tests__/events.integration.test.ts`

Setup: seed platforms (#5), register user

| Case | Expected |
|------|----------|
| Valid event (mock Horizon success) | scoreImpact > 0 |
| Duplicate txHash | 409 |
| Invalid platform key | 401 |
| Wallet < 30 days (mock Horizon age) | scoreImpact 0 + note |
| 11th event same month | scoreImpact 0 + cap note |
| Unregistered wallet | 404 |

Mock `verifyTransaction` and `fetchStellarWalletData` via dependency injection or module mock.

### 4. Integration ‚Äî lender auth

- `GET /api/user/{wallet}/score` without header ‚Üí 401
- With valid lender seed key ‚Üí 200

---

## Package.json scripts

```json
{
  "scripts": {
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest"
  }
}
```

---

## CI integration (#19)

Add job after unit tests stable:

```yaml
- name: Test
  run: npm test
  working-directory: Server
  env:
    DATABASE_URL: mysql://root:test@127.0.0.1:3306/zcore_test
```

With GitHub Actions `services.mysql`.

---

## Files to create/modify

| Path | Action |
|------|--------|
| `Server/vitest.config.ts` | Create |
| `Server/src/services/__tests__/*.test.ts` | Create |
| `Server/src/__tests__/*.integration.test.ts` | Create |
| `Server/package.json` | Add devDeps + scripts |
| `CONTRIBUTING.md` | Document `npm test` |
| `.github/workflows/ci.yml` | Add test job (#19) |

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] SEP-53 verify test vector passes
- [ ] Auth register/login roundtrip test passes against test DB
- [ ] Event report tests cover cap, wallet age, txHash dedup
- [ ] Lender key middleware tested
- [ ] `npm test` documented in CONTRIBUTING
- [ ] Tests run in CI on PRs
